title: Hub v2 Assistant Manifest
description: Per-entry manifest for a HubAssistant. v2 keys the entry off the envelope's reverse-DNS `name` (and `version`). The body drops the v1 `recommended_models` / `recommended_mcp_servers` / `use_cases` / `example_prompts` / `popularity_score` fields and replaces the recommended_* pair with a typed `dependencies[]` list using reverse-DNS names and semver ranges.

parameters.description: Free-form JSON config (temperature, max_tokens, etc.). Conventionally an empty {} for vanilla assistants.

dependencies.description: Informational cross-entry references (models + mcp-servers this assistant works best with). v2 does NOT auto-install dependencies; the FE surfaces them as 'Works best with' chips.

repository.description: Optional upstream source-of-truth for assistants that live in a separate repository (rare).
